title: NIOSH Criteria for a Recommended Standard: Occupational Exposure to Heat and Hot Environments
citation: NIOSH (2016). DHHS Publication No. 2016-106. Revised Criteria.
note: Section 6 has the WBGT × work-intensity work/rest adjustment tables. The OSHA-NIOSH Heat App implements these. Federal NPRM 2024 cites this as the technical basis for proposed thresholds.
